data.title: MediciNova signs SEPA for $30M in common stock, to span 36 months; an NASDAQ-listed company with Tokyo Code 4875.
data.description: MediciNova, Inc., headquartered in La Jolla, California, disclosed on July 31, 2025, the details of a Standby Equity Purchase Agreement (SEPA) facilitating the potential issuance of up to $30 million in common stock. This biopharmaceutical company is publicly listed on the NASDAQ Global Market under the symbol MNOV and also on the Tokyo Stock Exchange with the code number 4875. The SEPA agreement extends over 36 months, allowing for the gradual purchase of the aforementioned value in common stock.

data.title: Peak Energy unveils first grid-scale sodium-ion battery system in the U.S., cutting costs with new tech.
data.description: Peak Energy has launched a groundbreaking battery energy storage system that eliminates almost all moving components through innovative patented technology, resulting in substantial cost reductions. This pioneering solution marks a significant advancement in the industry. The company, Peak Energy, headquartered in the United States, specializes in the development of large-scale, cost-effective energy storage solutions. The technology was unveiled in Denver on July 31, 2025, showcasing its potential to revolutionize energy storage. This innovation highlights Peak Energy's commitment to driving innovation and efficiency in the energy sector.

data.title: JP Morgan CEO Jamie Dimon now supports stablecoins, but remains a skeptic of Bitcoin.
data.description: Jamie Dimon, the CEO of JP Morgan Chase and once a vocal critic of cryptocurrencies, recently expressed positive sentiments about stablecoins. However, he still maintains his skepticism towards Bitcoin, stating that he does not believe in its value. This shift in stance comes as Dimon acknowledged the potential of stablecoins while remaining hesitant towards Bitcoin's role in the financial market. The notable executive's comments highlight the evolving views within the financial sector regarding digital assets.
